title: Iraqi prime minister to visit Washington on Monday; oil and gas deals expected
text:
Iraqi prime minister to visit Washington on Monday; oil and gas deals expected

Jul 12, 2026

Add AL-MONITOR on Google

FILE PHOTO: Iraqi Prime Minister-designate Ali al-Zaidi speaks during a parliamentary session to vote in a new government headed by Ali al-Zaidi as prime minister, at the parliament headquarters in Baghdad, Iraq, May 14, 2026. REUTERS/Ahmed Saad/File Photo — Ahmed Saad

Baghdad July 12 (Reuters) - Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi will travel to Washington on Monday at the head of an official delegation after an official invitation, government spokesperson Haider al-Aboudi said in a press conference on Sunday. "The agreements to be signed will include several memorandums of understanding in the oil and gas sector as Iraq prepares to bring in various U.S. companies that will provide momentum to increase oil production capacity," al-Aboudi said. (Reporting by Muayad HameedWriting by Eman AbouhassiraEditing by David Goodman)
